description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine positioned below the receiver. The upper receiver is equipped with a carry handle and integrated iron sights, while the handguard is ribbed for improved grip. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider. The trigger guard is prominent, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The magazine is shown detached, highlighting the rifle's modularity and ease of reloading.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and detached magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel, front sight, and the magazine placed to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, pistol grip, and the overall length of the rifle.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the carry handle, iron sights, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
